title: Midrian - Zombie Apocalypse
description: Turn your game into a Zombie Apocalypse!
body:
![midrian-za-icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2372a19eee1ff5c6fe5c26760bd9e6f31f09b9e8.png)

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/SF-LkTgQcS8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

**Midrian ZA** is a mod that aims to transform your regular game into a zombie apocalypse. It removes all entities that spawn in the world using the canSpawnInTheDark check, leaving only creatures that can spawn during daylight. In other words: No Creepers!

Instead, we have the Zeeper, a zombie that carries dynamite so you'll continue to be afraid to sleep outdoors.

**How to use**: After installing and opening your normal world, the mod will disable the natural spawning of other creatures, and allow only its _own entities_:

![70% chance of spawning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5fab5b27544d7eef61bda54fa52e06f0c7c063cf.png)
- **Daytime Zombie**: Zombie that becomes weaker during the day.
- 70% chance of spawning

![15% chance of spawning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63cd9cfc5bd43eb13c2322af68431d6a66205e24.png)
- **Old Daytime Zombie**: Zombie that has no legs.
- 15% chance of spawning

![10% chance of spawning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fae119402791db0b0393e3822b66ffeb5d53631e.png)
- **Runner Zombie**: Zombie that has "beautiful" legs and can run.
- 10% chance of spawning

![5% chance of spawning](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e830c0180e9c1ad3e59bbbfb07bc8bd4f639eb41.png)
- **Zeeper Zombie**: Zombie that carries dynamite.
- 5% chance of spawning

_This mod doesn't prevent common entities from appearing. They can still spawn normally through a monster generator (dungeon) or /summon._

- MZA Integrates Gamingbarn's weapons!
- MZA Now it creates small and medium-sized cities!
- MZA now has his own bladed weapons and food!
- MZA have multiple zombie textures (With ETF).
- MZA doesn't have glowing eyes for zombies in the shaders (yet).
- MZA only exists for Fabric (This is for sure).

Nether and END remain the same, but perhaps the endermen have disappeared. _Where did they go at a time like this?_
